_provenance: Best-per-pair slice of the DISO-OAEI per-system coherence matrix: TBox-level coherence of the merged ontology pair under the per-pair best system's alignment (whole-merge method; individuals removed before reasoning; complete reasoner JFact, else HermiT; ROBOT 1.9.10). Extracted 2026-07-04 from the organisers' coherence-eval results; the full per-system matrix (all matchers x methods x reasoners, with with-ABox flags) is published in the supplementary materials at track launch.

thinkhome-brick.note: JFact does not terminate on Brick qudt datatypes; HermiT value is a genuine complete classification
